name: Spec Update — Review Impact
description: When a spec document is edited, identify which page objects and test classes are impacted and prompt the developer to review them

then.prompt:
A spec document in .kiro/specs/ai-ecommerce-automation-framework/ was just updated. Please:
1. Identify which requirements or design decisions changed
2. List the Page Object classes in src/test/java/pages/ that may be impacted
3. List the test classes in src/test/java/tests/ that may need updating
4. Check if testdata/testdata.json needs new or updated keys
5. Summarise the changes needed in a short bullet list for the developer to review
